facts.statementZh: World Bank 指标 TM.VAL.MRCH.CD.WT（China merchandise imports）未形成年度宏观背景事实：World Bank indicator TM.VAL.MRCH.CD.WT unavailable: ConnectionError: HTTPSConnectionPool(host='api.worldbank.org', port=443): Max retries exceeded with url: /v2/country/CHN/indicator/TM.VAL.MRCH.CD.WT?format=json&date=2016%3A2026&per_page=1000 (Caused by NewConnectionError("HTTPSConnection(host='api.worldbank.org', port=443): Failed to establish a new connection: [WinError 10013] 以一种访问权限不允许的方式做了一个访问套接字的尝试。"))。
facts.interpretationHint: World Bank 指标缺失时，宏观背景或全球周期判断必须降权。
facts.scoreCapPolicy: missing annual macro background caps macro demand and global cycle claims.
policyNotes: World Bank indicators are generally annual or lagged and cannot prove 1-3 month domestic nonferrous supply-demand by themselves.
World Bank macro data can support background context and score caps, not company earnings confirmation.

policyNotes: N57 Fact Bank v2 overwrites the existing Dust2 nonferrous fact bank path; it is not a parallel library.
FRED supports global metal price proxies only.
BaoStock supports A-share market, valuation and liquidity proxies only.
AKShare is an access provider / collector; SHFE and INE remain the source publishers for exchange facts.
World Bank supports annual macro background only and is lagged.
UN Comtrade is optional, lagged, and must not replace domestic inventory or spot evidence.
